emails.subject: Fwd curves
emails.body: Fwd curves Margaret, The forward power and gas price curves, unlike NYMEX futures prices, are not publicly available and are a closely guarded secret of the trading desks. We have no authority to release them without getting the head of the trading desk involved. Vince

emails.subject: Re: Fwd curves
emails.body: Re: Fwd curves Thx I understand and will work with Kevin and Hunter..Margaret
